************************************************************

Enter Option:q


 

Create Virtual Tables:

Either by running statement or with Database Explorer, it is possible to create Virtual Table in SAP HANA Cloud (1,2). To create Virtual Table, ABAP Program has to be run in Application Server layer in SAP S/4HANA (if HANA Enterprise Edition is used, you can run statement directly in HANA DB Layer).

 

For creating virtual tables in SAP HANA Cloud (1, 2), run the following statements.

create virtual table "S4H100_IFICOMPANYCODE" at "S4H100"."".""."ABAP_CDS.IFICOMPANYCODE$P";

create virtual table "HANAS4H_ZARTEST01" at "HANAS4H".""."SAPHANADB"."ZARTEST01";


 

Virtual tables are created.


Table ZARTEST01 in SAP S/4HANA.


Select and Insert data in HANA for SAP S/4HANA. “Insert” to Virtual Table is also possible.

-- Select and Insert data in Virtual Tables

Select top 100 * from "S4H100_IFICOMPANYCODE";



insert into "HANAS4H_ZARTEST01" values ('L','2','3');

Select top 100 * from "HANAS4H_ZARTEST01";

 

 


Data in ZARTEST01 in SAP S/4HANA.

 

It is possible for Virtual Table to have data physically by adding Replica. There are 2 types of replication: Real-time and Snapshot. See the blog for further detail. See the views M_VIRTUAL_TABLE_REPLICAS and M_VIRTUAL_TABLE_REPLICA_ACTION_HISTORY for checking the status of replica.

--- Create Replica for Virtual Table

-- Add Replica - Realtime

alter virtual table "HANAS4H_ZARTEST01" add shared replica;



--- Drop Replica - Realtime

alter virtual table "HANAS4H_ZARTEST01" drop replica;



-- Add Replica - Snapshot

alter virtual table "HANAS4H_ZARTEST01" add shared snapshot replica;



-- Add Replica - Refresh Snapshot

alter virtual table "HANAS4H_ZARTEST01" refresh snapshot replica;



-- Add Replica - Snapshot Drop

alter virtual table "HANAS4H_ZARTEST01" drop replica;


 

It is also possible to connect via SDA. SAP Cloud Connector is needed instead of DP Agent in the case. Refer to the blog for more about it.


B. In HANA server for SAP S/4HANA to SAP HANA Cloud

Create Remote Source:

To create Remote Source in HANA for SAP S/4HANA, follow the steps in SAP Help. Below are the statements run in SQL Console in HANA Studio logging with SYSTEM.

 

CREATE PSE HANAC;



CREATE CERTIFICATE FROM '

-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----



-----END CERTIFICATE-----

' COMMENT 'BTP'; 



SELECT CERTIFICATE_ID FROM CERTIFICATES WHERE COMMENT = 'BTP'; 

ALTER PSE HANAC ADD CERTIFICATE ;



SET PSE HANAC PURPOSE REMOTE SOURCE;



CREATE REMOTE SOURCE SAP HANA CLOUD ADAPTER "hanaodbc" 

CONFIGURATION 'Driver=libodbcHDB.so;ServerNode=xxxxxx.SAP HANA Cloud.ondemand.com:443;

encrypt=TRUE;'

WITH CREDENTIAL TYPE 'PASSWORD' USING 'user=GLOBAL;password=Welcome1';


 

“SAP HANA Cloud.ondemand.com:443”: replace to the endpoint of your SAP HANA Cloud.

Replace “Welcome1” of the user GLOBAL to your password.

 

Create Virtual Tables:

To create Virtual Table in ABAP stack, run the program ZICA_CREATE_VIRTUAL_TABLE. See the blog to understand more.

In the following parameter, the virtual table for the table ORDERS in the Schema GLOBAL is created.


To read the data via the virtual table, run the SELECT statement with Tcd DBACOCKPIT > Diagnostics > SQL Editor in SAPGUI.

“/1BCAMDP/” is added as the prefix of the VT_NAME.

Tcd DBACOCKPIT > Diagnostics > SQL Editor.


Result:


Create CDS View for the Virtual Table.

Table function and AMDP are created for the virtual table, and CDS View is created on top.

 

Table Function

@ClientDependent: false

@EndUserText.label: 'ZPT_CUSTOMERS'

define table function ZPT_CUSTOMERS

returns {

  CUSTOMERID: abap.char(50);

  CITYID: abap.char(50);

  COUNTRYID: abap.char(50);

  REGIONID: abap.char(50);

  CUSTOMER: abap.char(50);

  CITYNAME: abap.char(50);

  COUNTRYNAME: abap.char(50);

  REGIONNAME: abap.char(50);



}

implemented by method ZCL_AMDP_FUNCTIONS_NOCL=>GET_CUSTOMERS_FOR_CDS;


 

Class-Method of AMDP used in the Table Function.

class zcl_amdp_functions_nocl definition

  public

  final

  create public .

  public section.

    interfaces if_amdp_marker_hdb .

    class-methods GET_CUSTOMERS_FOR_CDS

        for table function ZPT_CUSTOMERS.

  protected section.

  private section.

endclass.

 class zcl_amdp_functions_nocl implementation.



    method GET_CUSTOMERS_FOR_CDS by database function

        for hdb

        language sqlscript.

--        options read-only.

        RETURN

        SELECT

        CUSTOMERID,

        CITYID,

        COUNTRYID,

        REGIONID,

        CUSTOMER,

        CITYNAME,

        COUNTRYNAME,

        REGIONNAME

        FROM "/1BCAMDP/SAP HANA CLOUD_CUSTOMERS" AS CUSTOMERS;



    endmethod.



ENDCLASS.


 

CDS View:

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZIVHCCUSTOMERS'

@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true

@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK

@EndUserText.label: 'ZI_VHANAC_CUSTOMERS'

define view ZI_VHANAC_CUSTOMERS as select from ZPT_CUSTOMERS {

CUSTOMERID,

CITYID,

COUNTRYID,

REGIONID,

CUSTOMER,

CITYNAME,

COUNTRYNAME,

REGIONNAME    

}


 

Data Preview of the CDS View.



 

 

Move data to Data Lake


Data in SAP HANA Cloud can be moved to SAP HANA Cloud, Data Lake.

It is possible to create table in Data Lake by running Procedure in SAP HANA Cloud. To do that, privilege has to be added in Database Explorer.

 

GRANT HANA_SYSRDL#CG_ADMIN_ROLE TO GLOBAL;


 

Then, run the procedure REMOTE_EXECUTE.

CALL SYSRDL#CG.REMOTE_EXECUTE('BEGIN

CREATE TABLE "CUSTOMERS"(

	"CUSTOMERID" VARCHAR(50),

	"CITYID" VARCHAR(50),

	"COUNTRYID" VARCHAR(50),

	"REGIONID" VARCHAR(50),

	"CUSTOMER" VARCHAR(50),

	"CITYNAME" VARCHAR(50),

	"COUNTRYNAME" VARCHAR(50),

	"REGIONNAME" VARCHAR(50),

PRIMARY KEY(CUSTOMERID)

);

END');


Remote Source SYSRDL#CG_SOURCE in SAP HANA Cloud is that for Data Lake. In the remote source, the table “CUSTOMERS2 is created.

Create Virtual Table for this table in GLOBAL Schema.


Object Name: DATALAKE_CUSTOMERS

Schema: GLOBAL


 

 

--- Create UNION View Table in SAP HANA Cloud and in Data Lake

create view CUSTOMERS_TOTAL as

select * from GLOBAL.CUSTOMERS

union all

select * from GLOBAL.DATALAKE_CUSTOMERS;



--create Procedure to move data to Data Lake

--DROP PROCEDURE  MOVE_DATA;

CREATE PROCEDURE MOVE_DATA(CID int)

 LANGUAGE SQLSCRIPT AS

 BEGIN

	DECLARE CUSTOMERS_COUNT int;

	DECLARE CUSTOMERS_COUNT2 int;

	select count(*) into CUSTOMERS_COUNT from CUSTOMERS_TOTAL;

	insert into "GLOBAL"."DATALAKE_CUSTOMERS" select * from CUSTOMERS where CUSTOMERID < CID;

	delete from CUSTOMERS where CUSTOMERID < CID;

	select count(*) into CUSTOMERS_COUNT2 from CUSTOMERS_TOTAL;



	IF CUSTOMERS_COUNT= CUSTOMERS_COUNT2

	  THEN commit;

	ELSE

	  rollback;

	END IF;

 END;

 

--- Run Procedure

 call MOVE_DATA(10);


Select data in the Virtual Table

select * from "GLOBAL"."DATALAKE_CUSTOMERS"


 

Data of CUSTOMERID < 10 are moved to table in the Data Lake.

 

Analyzing data in SAP S/4HANA or SAP HANA Cloud


It is possible to analyze data either/both in SAP S/4HANA and SAP HANA Cloud on SAP S/4HANA or SAP HANA Cloud.

 

Characteristics of analytics in SAP S/4HANA

    • SAP Fiori analytical apps can be used. SAC is optional.

 

    • Analytic Engine coming from BW is available for analytic query. See Wiki and the section of the blog for further detail.

 

    • Users/authorizations in SAP S/4HANA is available.

 

    • Table Function/AMDP has to be created for the data in SAP HANA Cloud in addition to Virtual Table.

 

    • SAP Named User license for SAP S/4HANA is required for SAP Fiori analytical apps. In case of SAC, SAP Named user license should not be necessary. (Need to reconfirm SAP license sales).

 

    • Deeper knowledge is needed of CDS View.



Refer to the blog to understand more about SAP S/4HANA Analytics.

Characteristics of Analytics in SAP HANA Cloud

    • Analytics tool like SAC is mandatory.

 

    • SAP Named User license is not necessary.

 

    • Mainly modeled with SQL in SAP HANA Cloud,



Firstly, Calculation View has to be created in SAP HANA Cloud, then create Live Connection to the SAP HANA Cloud in SAC. Model and Story are created (Tutorial).

SDI - Data Transformation


It is possible to use Smart Data Integration (SDI) function for Data Transformation within SAP HANA Cloud without additional license. You can enjoy higher productivity for data transformation in SAP HANA Cloud.

SAP HANA Cloud can be connected with many sources by creating Remote Source. Virtual Table is created to access the data in external source. Flowgraph is created for data transformation.

It could be used for data migration, data transformation for data distribution. DP Agent has to be installed to connect to many sources.

See the blog for further detail.

entry.title: SAP Premium Engagement: A service roadmap for SAC, S/4 Embedded Analytics, Business Objects and Planning
entry.content:
Who we are

We are SAP’s Center of Expertise (COE) for Analytics, Planning, and Consolidation in the globally operating Adoption Service Center. Our goal is to drive adoption and consumption of SAP Business Technology Platform technologies and lay the foundation for the Intelligent Enterprise. We are a trusted partner for customers with MaxAttention or Premium Engagement (PE). Also, we engage in the area of Professional Services, Preferred Success and other partnerships.


Introduction

With thousands of established and new customers moving and expanding their Analytics & Planning solutions in S/4 and BTP, we want to explain how our Premium Engagement services offer every type of help needed for your success.

OnPrem, in the cloud or hybrid

Our services and experts provide solutions and guidance in S/4, BTP, BW/4 and Business Objects. We support with integration, implementation and prototyping. We guide you in your Big Data and AI innovation journey to a quick and positive ROI with modern analytics, planning and forecasting.

 

Priorities for the Customer from Analytics and Data Management Perspective


From discovery to run

Our service portfolio (Service and Support Catalog link) and engagement model range from:

    • Expert workshops for discovering innovation.

 

    • Architecture and strategy services where new solutioning options are defined reflecting your requirements.

 

    • Design, configuration, migration, enablement and prototyping services for your specific analytics, data mangement and planning scenarios.

 

    • Holistic functional and technical assessments, verifications, performance tuning and stress testing.

 

    • E2E monitoring and issue analysis during go-live and cutover.



 

Service Portfolio for SAP Analytics and Planning


 Key services and highlights

    • Analytics Strategy: Workshop with experts to define your own path and strategy to a modernized SAP landscape in the area of enterprise analytics and planning, S/4HANA embedded analytics, enterprise data warehousing, and integration scenarios.

 

    • Analytics Design: Learn how to refine the implementation aspects of the analytics architecture, e.g., source system connections to SAC, SSO, creating models, UX and reporting & planning applications.

 

    • Jump-start for Analytics and Data Management: Demo realization and prototyping of a use case. Identify and realize business processes and KPIs for your enterprise analytics, data management and planning. For example, re-platforming Lumira to SAC.

 

    • Enablement Workshop for Data and Analytics: Show-and-tell session and teaching for your technical and functional teams on analytics features, concepts and methods.

 

    • Technical Integration Check: Technical assessment of the solution, business processes, interfaces, and system landscape. Transparency and action plans for expert guidance and follow up.

 

    • Business Process Performance Optimization: Analyzing and improving the performance of business processes.

 

    • Volume Test Optimization: Simulation of peak usage in Analytics to validate if the underlying solution architecture can handle the load.

 

    • Analytics & Data Management Health Check: Remote check of the analytics solution for a potential misconfiguration of parameter settings or logs and operational aspects (e.g., housekeeping).

 

    • Going Live Support: System monitoring during go-live and hyper-care. Root cause analysis of critical issues during cut-over period.



Service Assignment Options

These services are available for a variety of SAP support frameworks, including Value Assurance, SAP MaxAttention, SAP Active Embedded, and SAP Active Attention. Don’t hesitate to reach out to your Technical Quality Manager (TQM), your SAP Account, your Customer Success Partner (CSP), or our central entry channel, the Virtual Project Room (VPR) to unleash the full potential of SAC, the unrivaled symphony of data insights that elevate your business intelligence to new heights.

In the blogs below we share more tools and insights from our engagements.

    • SAP Analytics Cloud – Planning in Unified Story using Input Controls

 

    • BEx to AfO Automated Mass Conversion Tool

 

    • SAP Analytics Cloud – Replicating BW Analysis Authorizations into Dimension Read/Write Property

 

    • why UX and Accessibility are important

entry.title: Where can I develop a basic understanding of SAP S/4HANA embedded analytics?
entry.content:
You can build the skills you need, for free and at your own pace with our Digital Learning Journey. 
on  our SAP Learning Site

I recommend to access our Discovering SAP S/4HANA embedded analytics learning journey


Overview
This learning journey supports the development of foundation knowledge of the core analytical capabilities of SAP S/4HANA, known as Embedded Analytics.

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, business users and data analysts will have developed a basic understanding of SAP S/4HANA embedded analytics and how it is used to support operational analytics.

Prerequisites

  • Basic knowledge of business IT
  • Basic knowledge of analytics
 
Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

I hope this is helpful

Please ask a question related to the digital learning journey in the Q&A area

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

We appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics (new free Learning Journey on learning.sap.com)
entry.content:
According to DSAG's latest investment report 2022, the number of companies using modern SAP S/4HANA is steadily increasing. The report shows that the percentage of customers and partners who use SAP S/4HANA productively has doubled compared to the previous year. 

Not surprising, since the end of support is gradually getting closer and at the same time almost all new functions and connections are being delivered with a clear focus on SAP S/4HANA. An important part of this is the analytical component: SAP S/4HANA embedded analytics  


In short, this is a technology that moves mainly on two levels architecturally. So-called ABAP CDS Views are used as the central objects, which are delivered on the basis of the module-specific SAP S/4HANA tables (e.g. ACDOCA) or can be built independently. Corresponding SQL views on the SAP HANA database are used one level down in order to implement the performance-supporting push-down effect. The ABAP Development Tool (ABAP Eclipse) is used for modelling. Alternatively, simpler objects can also be created graphically using the delivered SAP Fiori tools (e.g. Custom CDS View, Analytical Queries).  

If you are interested in taking a look behind the scenes of the SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics concept, then use our new Learning Journey Discovering SAP S/4HANA embedded analytics  and learn everything you need to know about it at your own pace.

Fill the gap through upskilling and enjoy SAP’s learning offerings on the SAP Learning site. This article is created and brought to you by SAP Product Learning CoE experts!

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402 亮点前瞻：分析报表
entry.content:
在本篇博客中，我将会重点展示在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2402 当中分析报表版块发布的功能，将会覆盖以下话题内容：

  • 视图浏览器
  • 术语更改：Web Dynpro 应用 -> 多维数据网格应用
  • 新增：“管理 KPI 和报表”应用中的审核小册子设计器
  • 升级后弃用的CDS

 

视图浏览器

 

在CE2402中，视图浏览器APP将新增一个变量信息“数据提取已启用”。当该字段标识为“√”，即表示该CDS视图可用于数据提取的场景。

客户可以通过APP中的设置，将数据提取变量字段进行显示。

 

 

 

术语更改：Web Dynpro 应用 -> 多维数据网格应用

 

为统一文档中的表述，自 CE2402 起，文档中的术语“Web Dynpro 应用”将会替换为“多维数据网格应用”。

另外需要注意的是只有分析类的应用会进行术语更改。其他的基于Web-Dynpro的事务应用，例如APP显示科目余额（W0130），该应用的术语不会进行更改。

 

审核手册亮点更新

全页模式下便于使用

  • 侧边栏隐藏功能
  • 专注于报表内容便于使用

通过MS Teams轻松共享见解

  • 支持分享审核手册链接，携带预先设置好的变量信息等，无需重新设置
  • 便于使用MS Teams聊天讨论报表相关内容

支持PDF导出功能

 

新增：“管理 KPI 和报表”应用中的审核手册设计器

 

拥有分析专家权限的客户现可以在APP管理KPI和报表中通过选项卡“审核手册”浏览访问审核手册，并支持客户创建自定义的审核手册。

审核手册设计器属于关键用户开发（Key User Extensibility）。客户可以复制并根据客户的分析需要进行调整，但只有状态为最终配置或应用程序已激活的审核手册才可以被复制。

此外，SAP 已预先提供了标准的审核手册，例如集团财务报表审核手册。

 

 

 

更多关于如何复制和配置审核手册可以参考文档。

 

 

升级后弃用的CDS

系统升级后有CDS会被弃用，例如I_Materialstock。建议客户查看弃用CDS清单，根据系统实际使用情况，尽快切换到后继CDS。

 

更多关于 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition分析报表话题:

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud嵌入式分析业务用例汇总及简介 查看
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud公有云版本中三系统开发扩展性与二系统关键用户扩展性报表开发对比 查看

entry.title: SAP Activate – What’s New in User Experience guidance with SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Good news for those implementing SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA!

Over the last couple of months, the SAP S/4HANA RIG team have been hard at work bringing several updates to the User Experience content and accelerators for SAP S/4HANA roadmaps in SAP Activate.

These updates bring the latest information for SAP S/4HANA 2023 (and 2022) releases to your project planning.

The following roadmaps now include User Experience content and accelerators:

  • SAP Activate Methodology for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
  • SAP Activate Methodology for Transition to SAP S/4HANA
  • SAP Activate Methodology for SAP S/4HANA Upgrades

What’s Changed?

  • Much of the UX-related task content has been updated in SAP Activate Methodology for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition.
  • Several accelerators have been updated and shared across multiple related roadmaps.  Here’s a quick summary of what’s changed.

Below you will find a quick summary of what to use when you are:

  • Getting started with SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA
  • Want to see an examples of how experts introduce UX
  • Planning to demonstrate SAP Fiori
  • Planning your SAP S/4HANA upgrade
  • Moving to Spaces and Pages layout
  • Looking to grow your usage of SAP Fiori 
  • Looking to add SAP Build Work Zone and SAP Mobile Start
  • Want more User Experience advice in SAP Activate

P.s. Much of the content in SAP Activate related to system conversions has also been updated by the SAP S/4HANA RIG team.  You can find more about the other updates in blog post News from SAP Activate SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402

Getting started with SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA ?

Not sure how to explain User Experience to your business?

  • You’ll find some useful slides and preparation ideas in UX Adoption: Establish the Business Value of UX Workshop (Public)

Want to see an examples of how experts introduce UX?

See how I do it in the openSAP course SAP S/4HANA UX for Business and Functional Experts. Missed it? No problem! Join the course self-paced.

Review the video:

  • Unit 1: How to explain the value of SAP Fiori

Planning to demonstrate SAP Fiori?

You will find it very helpful to review the SAP Fiori: Tips & Tricks for Users of SAP S/4HANA which is also listed in the SAP Activate accelerators.

You will need a User Experience Strategy to set your baseline expectations, architecture, features, and tools.  Accelerator User Experience Strategy Template (Public)  now contains much more assistance, along with some Guiding Principles to help you keep your team human-centred.

Want to discuss your UX Strategy with your business?

Accelerator UX Adoption: UX Strategy and Guiding Principles Workshop (Public) now has a flipbook-style section showing how to make cross-functional feature in/out of scope decisions with your team.

Planning a SAP S/4HANA upgrade ?

Take a look at SAP Activate roadmap SAP Activate Methodology for SAP S/4HANA Upgrades

Even if you are going for a technical upgrade approach, you will still need to revisit your UX Strategy and launchpad feature usage. This ensures you cover any mandatory changes due to:

  • New, changed, or deprecated launchpad features
  • Obsolete, deprecated, or superseded apps
  • New, changed, or deprecated launchpad administration tooling

Accelerator UX Adoption: UX Strategy and Guiding Principles Workshop (Public) shows how to make cross-functional feature in/out decisions with your team, and document the reasons for change.  Accelerator User Experience Strategy Template (Public) has the latest best practices for launchpad features and administration tooling.

Missing some advice on upgrading your SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA? Please let us know what else you need in the comments.

Moving to Spaces and Pages layout?

You will find some suggestions on how to get started in UX Adoption: How to approach Design your Launchpad Layout​ Workshop (Public)

Doing a deeper dive with blog post Info Package: Making the Move from Launchpad Groups to Spaces (In SAP S/4HANA and in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition)

Looking to grow your usage of SAP Fiori ?

Looking for ideas on which apps to use?

You will find updated guides for selecting apps by UX Value at UX Value Goal App Selection Guides (Public)

With more than 3K apps, even with suggestions from tools such as SAP Signavio Process Insights, and Readiness Check, you’ll need a way to narrow down the focus.

The UX Adoption Planning process shows how to have a now/next/later discussion to engage with your business stakeholders.

You can find an introduction to the major steps in openSAP course SAP S/4HANA UX for Business and Functional Experts. Missed it? No problem! Join the course self-paced.

Review the videos:

  • Week 1 Unit 7 UX adoption planning – Selecting UX for business value
  • Week 1 Unit 8 Real world experiences in defining a UX adoption roadmap

You will find the entire matching series of updated workshop templates in SAP Activate.  You will even find some suggestions on which major decision points to focus on at each stage to keep it simple.

  • UX Adoption: Establish the Business Value of UX Workshop (Public)
  • UX Adoption: UX Strategy and Guiding Principles Workshop (Public)
  • UX Adoption: Scope the Future Workshop (Public)
  • UX Adoption: Envision the Future Workshop (Public)
  • UX Adoption: How to approach Design your Launchpad Layout​ Workshop (Public)
  • UX Adoption: Review realized UX Business Benefits (Public)

Use it all or just whatever helps you move forward. That’s the intention ... and how other customers tell us they are using the content.

Looking to add SAP Build Work Zone and SAP Mobile Start?   

With SAP S/4HANA focus on SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition.

You will find the latest guidance and suggestions at SAP Community topic page for SAP Build Work Zone 

As a first step, you should review the latest architecture guidance announcements in blog post SAP Fiori Deployment Options and System Landscape Recommendations

You will find some suggestions on where to incorporate SAP Build Work Zone in your UX Strategy in accelerator User Experience Strategy Template (Public).  You can engage your business on your SAP Build Work Zone journey by using the Cross-Functional Feature Decisions approach shown in accelerator UX Adoption: UX Strategy and Guiding Principles Workshop (Public) 

Then get the latest news on what’s possible by reviewing the latest roadmap blog posts from SAP such as:

  • SAP UX Innovations in Public Cloud Products, Joule, AI, Entry Points, Apple Vision Pro and more
